programme.desc: Carrie meets a 'wrong guy' in her shrink's waiting room; Samantha dates a sports addict.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Sex Buddy

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Shortcomings
programme.desc: Miranda dates a divorced man and Carrie dates a storywriter's extended family.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Was It Good for You?
programme.desc: Carrie dates an alcoholic and wonders if she's a substitute for beer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Twenty-Something Girls vs. Thirty-Something Women
programme.desc: Samantha's assistant steals her Rolodex and throws a party; Charlotte dates a 26-year-old.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ex and the City
programme.desc: Carrie learns that Big is engaged; Charlotte gets reacquainted with an equine friend.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Samantha hooks-up with a fireman only to have the flames put out; Charlotte dates a bully.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Politically Erect
programme.desc: Charlotte plans to find a husband; Carrie's politician boyfriend has a surprising request.

programme.title: In the Room: Kourtney Kardashian
programme.desc: Kourtney Kardashian invites Jason Kennedy over to her house for a raw and real conversation. She talks life in the spotlight, finding a balance as a mom, love, breaking up as well as dishing on her famous siblings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Scott on the Rocks
programme.desc: Another outrageous season kicks off when Kourtney and Scott find them themselves pitted against her family who loves to hate Scott.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hot Cup of Love
programme.desc: Khloe is forced to get professional help for her anger issues towards Scott. Rob ends up in the hospital when he accidentally takes a drug unbeknownst to him.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Baby Blues
programme.desc: Khloé gets excited when she misses her period and suspects she's pregnant with her new husband's baby! Kim's tendency to tell 'little white lies' gets her into big trouble.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Shape Up or Ship Out
programme.desc: Kourt poses an ultimatum to Scott when he fails to take her pregnancy seriously. Bruce stands up to Kris and demands fiscal independence when she confiscates his ATM card.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: Kim takes in a sickly stray Chihuahua and is devastated when she must say goodbye. Rob gets pressured by Bruce to move out of the house.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Body Blows
programme.desc: Bruce teaches the Kardashian family how to give back by volunteering them to a charity boxing event. Kourtney learns a thing or two about child rearing by babysitting for friends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Weekend From Hell
programme.desc: Kourtney and her sisters take an ill-fated trip to Santa Barbara that forces them to question if they will ever be close again. Back at home, Kylie becomes jealous of Kendall.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: I Want Your Sex
programme.desc: Khloé makes a 'love tape' for her husband Lamar Odom of the Los Angeles Lakers. Meanwhile, Kourt learns to enjoy sex again while pregnant.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Blame It on the Alcohol
programme.desc: Kourtney ends her relationship with Scott after he gets violently drunk on Kim's birthday in Las Vegas. On top of the world, Kim takes on more work than she should.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Delivering Baby Mason
programme.desc: After fainting from exhaustion, Kim learns to manage her professional life. Kourt takes Scott back and gives birth to their baby son, Mason.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's House Party
programme.desc: When Kim moves into her new mansion, Kris insists that she throw a house warming party that grows out of control.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Blind Date
programme.desc: Eager to get Kim back in the dating scene, Kris forces Kim on a blind date with an Armenian professional athlete. Khloé has her hands full as the Lakers are in the playoffs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Missing Ring
programme.desc: Khloé is stuck between a rock and a hard place when she loses her seven-carat engagement ring and is afraid to tell Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: My Bodyguard
programme.desc: Kim develops a serious crush on her hot Australian bodyguard and Khloé helps Lamar to finally learn how to swim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Botox and Cigarettes
programme.desc: Fearful of aging, Kim gets botox and has a bad physical reaction. Meanwhile, the family discovers that Kris is a closet smoker and Kourt is determined to get her to quit.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kourt Goes A.W.O.L.
programme.desc: Tired of how her family neglects Scott, Kourt decides to house hunt in NYC and the family must rally to keep her in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Match Made in Hell
programme.desc: Khloe has a hard time accepting that Rob and her best friend, Malika, are hooking up. Kris must decide whether or not to manage the pop band, BG5.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Boys Allowed
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott struggle in the bedroom trying to have another baby. Bruce and Kylie trade enemy fire when Bruce can't accept she has male friends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris 'The Cougar' Jenner
programme.desc: Kris takes her flirtatious relationship with her hot personal trainer too far. Kim's competitive streak gets her into trouble and she is forced to be Kourt's servant for the day.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Dash No More
programme.desc: Kourtney wants out of their Dash stores completely when her sisters bow out of their newest store opening in NYC.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take NYC
programme.desc: The Kardashians hit NYC for Fourth of July weekend. Kim must confront her ex-boyfriend, Reggie Bush over her newfound love interest, Miles Austin.

programme.title: Chopped: Gold Medal Games: Baking
programme.desc: Four chefs famous for baking take on a thrilling heat in the Chopped Gold Medal Games! In the first round, the chefs must focus their creativity on a grocery store breakfast dough and a lovely cut of lamb.

programme.title: Chopped: Gold Medal Games: Grand Finale
programme.desc: All eyes are on the four returning champions to find out who will be the Gold Medal Games Grand Champion and go home with $50,000.

programme.title: Chopped: Tendon Loving Care
programme.desc: Tenderizing beef tendon and bringing joy to bok choy are challenges in round one. A veggie that barely fits in the basket and a protein are part of the puzzle in the entree round. A famed French dessert meets a bubbly surprise in the dessert round.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chicken, Chicken, Chicken
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking up a storm with chicken, chicken... and more chicken! She demonstrates the benefits of bulk buying with three fantastic dishes: slow cooker chicken and broccoli, chicken pie and chicken kale caesar salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast for Dinner
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's putting a breakfast spin on four dinners starting with sensational sausage kale strata, a real make-ahead wonder. Wild rice pancakes get flipped to dinnertime for the girls, while the boys enjoy breakfast quesadillas, packed full of bacon.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Working Calves at Tim's
programme.desc: The family is helping out at Ladd's brother's farm, and Ree is packing a cowboy-approved lunch. There's spicy baby back ribs, twice baked potato casserole, and slow cooked jalapeno corn.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: College Bound
programme.desc: The Drummond family is throwing a farewell dinner for college-bound cousins Paige and Caleb, featuring a spread of their favorite food. Ree Drummond makes two side dishes: brown butter mashed potatoes and roasted cauliflower salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night on the Town
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is having a night on the town with Ladd at a big bash for the Osage Cattlemen's Convention, so she's taken care of dinner for the kids to eat back at home. She prepares a slam-in-the-oven mini meatballs pasta bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Shakespeare Movie Night
programme.desc: Ree's hosting a movie night for her daughter's classmates and preparing a Roman-inspired menu to accompany it.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Tournament Of Champions: Part 2
programme.desc: Four returning champs are out to prove their first win was no fluke when they make their best breakfast featuring ingredients like frozen kale and kumquats.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Tournament of Champions: Part 3

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Tournament of Champions: Part 4
programme.desc: Four returning champions must prove they're upper crust by making a pizza without using any traditional pizza ingredients.

programme.title: Tanked!: NBA Wizardry

programme.title: Tanked!: The Miami Heat is On!
programme.desc: Seven-foot-tall NBA star Hassan Whiteside knows a thing or two about what it means to be big. He tasks Wayde and Brett with building him a tank so big it won't fit through the front door and has to be delivered to his Miami pad on a barge.

programme.title: Tanked!: Chicago Bull Boom Box

programme.title: Tanked!: Shaq-a-Tank!

programme.title: Tanked!: Nigiri and the NBA

programme.title: Tanked!: Kevin Smith's Tortally Awesome Tank

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Haunting
programme.desc: Police believed a pair of double homicides in Nebraska, five years apart, might be connected. Investigators working to solve the crimes feared the killer might strike again.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: In the 70’s, Ted Bundy brutally murdered at least 36 young women. Glamorized as a handsome, well-educated killer who outsmarted the law, was Bundy really an evil genius… or a con artist posing as privileged to hide the monster in plain sight.

programme.title: In Defense Of: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Sought out by serial killer, Ted Bundy, in the 1970s, Criminal Defense Attorney, John Henry Browne delves into his personal and professional journey to defend one of the most notorious killers in history.

programme.title: Manson: The Women
programme.desc: 50 years after the infamous Manson Family murders, we follow the trail of the women who blindly followed Charles Manson including new and exclusive interviews.

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Sam Little
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Beth Karas follows Sam Little, America's most prolific serial killer who confessed to murdering over 90 women in 17 states, in hopes to identify how he got away with murder for so long.

programme.title: Snapped: Ana Mancio
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a man who was gunned down in his delivery truck, police in California uncover an affair with deadly repercussions.

programme.title: Dateline: As Night Fell
programme.desc: A young woman is shot in her home just outside Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Snapped: Omaima Nelson
programme.desc: When a beautiful woman's much older husband disappears under mysterious circumstances, police suspect that more than just the woman's story has been cooked up.

programme.title: Snapped: Tammy Armstrong
programme.desc: In a classic game of good cop bad cop, a determined detective befriends a Wisconsin woman to solve her boyfriend's suspicious disappearance.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Lone Star Killer
programme.desc: A church going mother with no known enemies suddenly disappears from Northeastern Texas. As cops investigate the missing person case they uncover a serial predator from the shadows and rush to stop him before he kills again.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Missing in Minnesota
programme.desc: The clock is ticking as police in northern Minnesota rush to rescue a kidnapped college student. It takes NASA technology for law enforcement to uncover the identity of the abductor, who turns out to be a serial predator.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Killer Caller
programme.desc: Twin Cities, MN, police are hunting for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness. No one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Hog Trail Murders
programme.desc: After a husband and wife realize their dogs have been dragging human bones into their backyard, cops learn that a serial killer is using the nearby woods to indulge in his dark fantasies.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: Women are found brutally murdered and panic strikes Baton Rouge, LA. The city suspects a serial killer is on the loose. In an example of police work at its finest, detectives lead investigators to an unlikely suspect hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Ascension
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people are brutally murdered in their homes along the Mississippi River, a Task Force is formed to hunt down a serial killer before they can strike again.

programme.title: Green River Killer
programme.desc: In one of the largest and longest manhunts in the U.S., authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer. But now it's a cat and mouse game, as they try to get inside his mind, so he'll lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Mysteries & Scandals: Serial Killers of the ‘80s
programme.desc: The most legendary and intriguing crimes, murders, and scandals that shook the nation.

programme.title: The DNA of Murder With Paul Holes: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: In 1998, Kathleen Heisey, an elementary school principal, is discovered dead inside her home. Paul Holes investigates this shockingly provocative and brutal scene that sent shockwaves through Bakersfield, California.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Movie: American Made
programme.desc: A pilot is recruited by the CIA to perform reconnaissance flights over Central and South America, and soon his responsibilities expand to include smuggling weapons to the Contras. At the same time, a drug cartel also recruits him to smuggle cocaine.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Father
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a 1980s family sitcom and models his parenting skills after the show's sensible father, much to Bart's chagrin.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blue and the Gray
programme.desc: After spending another Valentine's Day alone, Moe attends a seminar to gain more confidence with women. Moe takes the doctor's advice and asks Homer to be his wingman, but then becomes distraught when women are drawn to Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Angry Dad: The Movie
programme.desc: Bart's cartoon about an angry dad is turned into a movie and quickly becomes a critics' favourite. When Russell Brand presents the Golden Globe to Bart's film, Homer usurps the podium and gives his own acceptance speech.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Scorpion's Tale
programme.desc: At a field trip, Lisa discovers that desert water mysteriously makes combative creatures get along, so she brings some of the water home as a souvenir. When Grampa moves in, Homer secretly tests the desert water on Grampa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Midsummer's Nice Dream
programme.desc: The town is abuzz when Cheech and Chong announce a Springfield stop on their much-anticipated reunion tour. When Chong is unable to perform, Homer steps in and delivers all the jokes by heart. Impressed, Cheech invites Homer to go on tour with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: When Homer inadvertently humiliates Bart in front of a stadium crowd, Marge encourages Homer to enroll in a fathering enrichment class taught by therapist Dr. Zander.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Illegal Gambling

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Pirates
programme.desc: In the South China Sea, pirates won’t stop until they get the world's most precious commodity: black gold.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Knock-offs
programme.desc: Anything and everything can be faked: watches, purses, shoes, electronics, smartphones. Go underground to see the breathtaking enterprise and expertise of counterfeiting - an economy that turns over an estimated $500 billion a year.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: The Black Market
programme.desc: Fuelled by the huge demand for luxury goods, where customers buy with no questions asked, cargo thieves stop at nothing to get their product into the black market.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Moonshine Mayhem
programme.desc: Black market moonshine is big business: high-proof, low-cost, untaxed and illegal. But the law is cracking down and urban bootleggers are bringing fresh competition.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: The Money Laundry
programme.desc: Follow the dirty drug dollars from American trap houses to wholesalers and transporters, funnelling billions into Mexico's money laundry.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Fracking Hell

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Land of Dragons

programme.title: Wild China: Heart of the Dragon

programme.title: Wild China: Beyond the Great Wall
programme.desc: Explores how 1.3 billion Chinese residents interact with stunning wildlife and landscapes.

programme.title: The Himalayas

programme.title: Wild Sri Lanka: Sea of Giants

programme.title: Wild Korea: Return to the Wild
programme.desc: A look at connections between Korea's human population has made with wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Korea: Life at the Borderlands
programme.desc: A unique natural wonderland has risen from the ashes in Korea's Demilitarized Zone.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom
programme.desc: Southern Thailand is a place of both spectacular natural beauty and unexpected surprise - where spirituality pervades every bit of life. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Elephant Forest

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Hidden Tiger

programme.title: Wild Central America: Costa Rica

programme.title: Wild Central America: Guatemala
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores Guatemala, uncovering dramatic wildlife and scenery along the way.

programme.title: Wild Colombia
programme.desc: Colombia touches both the Pacific and the Atlantic oceans. Sitting on the equator, this exotic land supports an extraordinary array of spectacular creatures.

programme.title: Wild Chile: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: From the Antarctic Peninsula to the Patagonian steppe, the wildlife faces a constant battle for survival.

programme.title: Wild Chile: Land Before Time
programme.desc: Rare creatures reveal secrets of South America's past in Chile's forests.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Mountains of Extremes: Water Kingdoms
programme.desc: Discover Argentina's best kept secret in the country's tropical north: Ibera.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Mountains of Extremes: The Killer Coast
programme.desc: On Argentina's rugged Eastern coast, some of nature's most spectacular animals battle for survival.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Mountains of Extremes: Mountains of Extremes
programme.desc: From the lofty peaks of the Andean mountains to the dry Patagonian steppe, follow the incredible and bizarre creatures that call this wilderness home.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Savage, bizarre, hellish and beautiful: explore the Islands that changed the World.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Ghost Ship Terror
programme.desc: Ghost ship sightings are frequent in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge underwater technology and witness testimony, a team of experts turn up new evidence to explain why sailors and crewmen vanish from their boats without a trace.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Devils' Treasure
programme.desc: New discoveries offer new leads to the possible whereabouts of lost treasures that belong to some of history's greatest villains. Today, experts are using cutting-edge archaeological methods to investigate where this priceless loot can be found.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of Yamashita's Treasure
programme.desc: Legend has it that Japanese soldiers buried a vast collection of valuable relics and gold in the jungle during the last days of World War II. Expert treasure hunters follow new leads in search of this long-lost plunder.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: The Quick and the Curious: Hack My Commute
programme.desc: Find out whether the five-second rule is legit, how Einstein can help with your daily commute, why it's so hard to swat a fly and whether you really think with your gut.

programme.title: The Quick and the Curious: The Coming Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: Find out the boiling point for humans, when the robot uprising will be, why our fingers wrinkle when wet and whether sports drinks really work.

programme.title: Hack My Brain: To Crack a Safe
programme.desc: Todd shows us how to hack the brain into being able to crack a safe.

programme.title: Real, Fake or ...: Deception by Design
programme.desc: The greatest viral videos on the internet might actually be deceptive PR stunts, and using the latest science, experts investigate the truth behind these attention-grabbing clips.

programme.title: Real, Fake or ...: Dangerous and Deadly
programme.desc: Experts use the latest science to investigate the truth behind videos that showcase death-defying stunts.

programme.title: Real, Fake or ...: Wild Things
programme.desc: Using the latest science, experts investigate the truth behind the internet's greatest animal clips.

programme.title: Built by Hand: Confessions of the Bowie Knife
programme.desc: The legend of the Alamo is incomplete without Jim Bowie and the deadly knife named after him, and today, skilled craftsmen use time-tested methods and modern-day know-how to build this innovative and world-changing weapon by hand.

programme.title: Built by Hand: Secrets of the Samurai Sword
programme.desc: Japan's samurais wielded deadly swords called katanas, and today, skilled craftsmen use time-tested methods and modern-day know-how to build these innovative and world-changing weapons by hand.

programme.title: Built by Hand: King of the Battlefield
programme.desc: The M1 Garand is a rifle that was once called the greatest battlefield tool ever made, and skilled craftsmen use time-tested methods and modern-day know-how to build these innovative and world-changing weapons by hand.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Summertime
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to roll out those lazy days of summer the right way with our favorite summertime dishes! He contemplates if ceviche is really cooked, whether gazpacho came from the Good Book and what the cake in strawberry shortcake is.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: Titans of Power
programme.desc: The world's biggest tidal turbine is a cutting-edge machine that can revolutionize the energy industry, but first, a crew of engineers must use the latest tech to battle dangerous tides and successfully install it.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?
programme.desc: A cheerleader vanished from Blanchester in 1996 and her boyfriend was convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: The Doctor's Wife
programme.desc: An affair between a doctor and his nurse leads to the deaths of himself and his wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: New Beginnings
programme.desc: The team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters, finally complete after 10 years of working out of trailers. The new team, Arcady and Ted, get to know each other's styles in their first shifts together.

programme.title: Nightwatch: The End Is Just the Beginning
programme.desc: From gunshot victims to seizures to a moped rider playing Pokémon Go, EMT's see everything on one more busy night before they can celebrate the end of the summer.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Laci Peterson
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a fresh look at the death of Laci Peterson, whose husband Scott was convicted of her murder in 2004 and is currently on death row.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Jam Master Jay
programme.desc: Marcia Clark dives deep into the world of hip hop to search for the truth of what really happened to legendary DJ, Jam Master Jay. Marcia will navigate the twists and turns of numerous theories that surround the mysterious death of this icon.

programme.title: American Monster: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Kevin and Joanne Dowling like to capture their kids' milestones on videotape in their modest suburban home. But when a woman in a nearby town is gunned down - and Kevin is accused of murder - his fate hangs on that same home video camera.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a devastating fire at the Kohnle family home leaves a family member dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. As the evidence mounts up, it's the testimony of two young kids who lead the police to decipher if it was an accident, suicide or murder.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: Diabolical: Teach Me to Kill
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, a beloved father of four is found dead in his car. He's been bound, gagged, and asphyxiated. Witnesses lead detectives to a local man named John Brian Ray. But this troubled man is just a pawn in the larger game of a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Body, a Trough, and 800 Pounds of Concrete
programme.desc: Tracy Fortson was the first female deputy sheriff of Oglethorpe County, Georgia. Her life came crashing down when she was convicted of her boyfriend's murder. But her family believes she was framed and want Chris and Fatima to help prove it.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Diabolical: Teach Me to Kill
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, a beloved father of four is found dead in his car. He's been bound, gagged, and asphyxiated. Witnesses lead detectives to a local man named John Brian Ray. But this troubled man is just a pawn in the larger game of a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Body, a Trough, and 800 Pounds of Concrete
programme.desc: Tracy Fortson was the first female deputy sheriff of Oglethorpe County, Georgia. Her life came crashing down when she was convicted of her boyfriend's murder. But her family believes she was framed and want Chris and Fatima to help prove it.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Going Places
programme.desc: A 39-year old woman, Melissa Lewis, has just made partner at a prestigious law firm, but when she is found murdered in a particularly personal manner.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Last Shot
programme.desc: Single father of four Richard Mannion always follows his heart. But when the 42-year-old is found shot dead in his home, police suspect he may have been looking for love in all the wrong places. Somewhere in his tangled web of romance hides a killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Who Killed Jane Doe 59?
programme.desc: Police search for the name of an unidentified woman murdered in 1969 and the person who killed her. The one lead that keeps coming up is Charles Manson and the Manson Family.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: When a vivacious young escort, Shannan Gilbert, vanishes on Long Island's south shore in 2010, her disappearance leads police to discover the bodies of ten other victims dumped by a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: While She Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When Denise and her husband, John, discover that someone has broken into their Allentown, Pennsylavania house, they think they know who did it. But one week after the break-in, Denise comes face to face with the intruder -- and she has no idea who he is.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Coming for Me
programme.desc: With a serial killer on the loose in Arlington, TX, 22-year-old Adriane Fields can't shake the chilling suspicion that she's next on the list. Crippled by fear, she moves across town, only to come face-to-face with what she feared most.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Shadow Walker
programme.desc: Sandi Musk thinks dating Andy LeFleur is a welcomed distraction from her ongoing divorce. But when it becomes clear he wants more than she's ready to give, she tries to call things off. Thing is, this is one guy who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Night Alone
programme.desc: College sophomore Gina Tenney is thrilled to be living all on her own. That is until she discovers she's got a stalker. And when she and her tormentor finally come face-to-face, it brings an even bigger surprise: this secret admirer is no stranger.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Off the Ranch in Colorado
programme.desc: After choosing possible houses in the Denver region, newlyweds Jennifer and Matt tour the structures with Mike, who shows them how to tell whether a home is a good buy or if it's a house that deserves a "goodbye".

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoke and Steam
programme.desc: Roger is invited to two community gatherings abundant with local foods on the Hawaiian Island of Oahu.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Roasts
programme.desc: Roger heads to Napa Valley for two unique pig roasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mediterranean Seafood Fests

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South American Grilling
programme.desc: Roger meets two chefs celebrating Argentina's Asado and Brazil's Churrasco in northern California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas BBQ
programme.desc: Roger visits two legendary BBQ joints in Texas where just the right amount of smoke and heat transforms the meat into delicious eats.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roasting and Ranching in Texas

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Manhattan Project
programme.desc: When an apartment becomes available in Manhattan, Carrie finally sees her dream of living in the city coming true but Doug has different plans and the two quickly realize they share a different outlook on the future.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Single Spaced
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie visit their priest for some marriage counselling, they run into friends who recently had a child, which causes both of them to think about adopting a baby.

programme.title: The King of Queens: China Syndrome

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fat City

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cello, Goodbye

programme.title: The King of Queens: Richie's Song
programme.desc: Carrie refuses to double date with Richie and his obnoxious cheating wife, Marie.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Two construction workers are brutally attacked in San Antonio, but one survives and is able to identify his assailant.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Sugar Daddy Death

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.desc: The guys test a war myth to see if a trench corner can slow down a shockwave and save a soldier.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: It's Personal With Amy Hoggart: Shame
programme.desc: Lighting director Kevin struggles with shame over not voting in the 2016 election. He's lied to everyone about it and living with the lie is now a nightmare. Amy devises a theatrical solution to help lower the final curtain on his shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Puncture Perfect
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr push all the wrong buttons at a video game store, try to rope rock climbers into repeating a bizarre word, and give away fake tickets to a flop of a show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Permanent Punishment
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Sal, and Joe provide a false sense of security to some sassy shoppers at a drug store, and the competition reaches new heights during a rematch of their balloon challenge in the grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Parks and Wreck!
programme.desc: The guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter and convince strangers to press send on their absurd e-mails. The loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: G.I. Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers share some (mis)information on aviation, and put-pocketing turns patriotic. A double punishment goes up in flames, and Joey Fatone recaps the season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Total Bellas: The Book of Bella

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: When a friendly alligator swims to the local yacht club, it's up to Warden Boone to remove it. Then, a father and son are attacked by an alligator, and wardens are determined to catch it, while a deer is left trapped on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Busted, Boozing and Boating
programme.desc: The Texas Game Wardens are in the thick of the prime outdoor season which means plenty of revelers on land and on water. A few groups of suspects may be having too much of a good time.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for the illusive big horn sheep in the mountains of West Texas. A family near Houston reports shots from a neighboring ranch are raining down on their home. Wardens track down a bow hunter, incriminated by his own game camera.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Out for Blood
programme.desc: It's the start of deer season, and the Texas woods are filled with hunters trying to bag a prize buck. Game Wardens are busy checking hunters across the state, while also investigating a rash of deer stand thefts, and rescuing a trio of baby hawks.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Game Warden
programme.desc: Texas game wardens patrol the inland waterways and the Gulf of Mexico. A nuisance alligator gets too close for comfort. Illegal fish lead to multiple citations. A suburban squirrel hunter gets caught trespassing. Wardens race to free an injured deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust
programme.desc: Down on the Mexican border, Game Wardens pull in an illegal gill net. A group caught trespassing is found with firearms and narcotics. In East Texas, Game Wardens question a man suspected of illegally hunting on private property.

programme.title: Tanked!: Be Cool
programme.desc: A 57,000 gallon tank for a mega church is finally complete and ready to be baptized by Wayde and Brett; a engaged girlfriend surprises her fiancé with a keg tank for his man cave; and Brett adds some flare to a lawyer's reception desk shark tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Triple Tank Throwdown!
programme.desc: Businessman Brad Jennings is building a new office and wants to top it off with three tanks from ATM.

programme.title: Tanked!: Brett Takes a Dive
programme.desc: A quarantine tank for some hands-on clients has the ATM team wishing for solitary confinement, Brett buys a clunker to build a car theme tank in record time without considering the consequences, and Brett is nervous to use his new scuba skills.

programme.title: Tanked!: Country Superstar Surprise!
programme.desc: Brittany Kerr, wife of country superstar Jason Aldean, wants Wayde and Brett to surprise her husband with a fish tank. The great outdoors themed tank has to be a total secret and built before Jason returns from his tour.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tanks N' Roses
programme.desc: Grammy nominated rock star and former Guns N' Roses guitarist, DJ Ashba shows up at ATM and asks Brett and Wayde to build him a creepy skull themed aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way
programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wyclef's Tank is Ready or Not?
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde get called to New Jersey for a tank emergency for world famous music producer, Wyclef Jean. This founder of the legendary group the Fugees has not one but two tanks that could really use ATM's help!

programme.title: Tanked!: 2 Chainz, 1 Tank
programme.desc: ATL's hottest rapper, 2 Chainz, is in search of an aquarium so he's contacted ATM. After Wayde loses some important measurements, he puts the pressure on Redneck to nail this tank and create a glowing Atlanta skyline underwater.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Test
programme.desc: Stan and Pat race to prepare Tanana to be a checkpoint for the Iditarod dog sled race. Charlie and Bob hunt a grizzly that has been terrorizing a miner's camp. Joe trains his new dog, hoping to turn him into a hunting partner.

programme.desc: Nations and Charlie have a confrontation over rights to a family trapline. Stan and Kathleen try to upgrade Tozi cabin, but get more than they bargained for. The Moore's kennel is on the line as Courtney and Nations race in the Yukon River Championship.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Blood on Their Hands
programme.desc: After a poor trapping season, Charlie Wright teams up with Stan Zuray in a last-ditch effort to catch beaver. Stan and Joe Zuray discover a large predator has been stealing from their trapline. James Roberts teaches his two sons the importance of hunting.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Nagamaki

programme.desc: Four blade smiths are tasked with making a canister damascus blade from threaded bolts. After a couple of intense rounds and some brutal testing, two smiths return to their home forges to recreate the deadly German Dussage Sword.

programme.desc: Four smiths are forced to select a forging technique, a decision that will impact their next round. Ultimately, two smiths will be chosen to recreate the Ikakalaka African Sword.
